creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Phil Budne wrote:

>  >System: FreeBSD mail.ultimate.com 7.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 7.0-CURRENT #1: Sat Aug 4 21:13:48 EDT 2007 phil@mail.ultimate.com:/stuff/obj/usr/src/sys/PE1550 i386

Hello,

With that version it's not very surprising, can you upgrade to one of
the -BETA's please, that way we can see whether this is still the case,
do note that some things changed for the TCP/IP stack and I think this
popped up before and had been resolved.

Let me know when it is NOT resolved yet.

Cheers & Thanks for using FreeBSD
